blogs.title: RabbitMQ Basics
blogs.description: Learn RabbitMQ fundamentals: exchanges, queues, bindings, and message patterns for asynchronous communication
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: RabbitMQ vs Kafka: Decision Guide
blogs.description: Comprehensive comparison of RabbitMQ and Apache Kafka: architectural differences, use cases, performance characteristics, and decision framework for choosing the right messaging system
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: RabbitMQ Clustering
blogs.description: Deep dive into RabbitMQ clustering: cluster formation, quorum queues, mirrored queues, node discovery, network partitioning, and production deployment strategies
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: RabbitMQ Exchanges, Bindings, and Routing
blogs.description: Comprehensive guide to RabbitMQ exchange types: direct, topic, fanout, headers exchanges, binding patterns, routing keys, and implementation in Spring Boot
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: RabbitMQ Dead Letter Queues and Retry Patterns
blogs.description: Implement dead letter queues and retry mechanisms in RabbitMQ: DLQ configuration, TTL-based retry, delayed retry, poison message handling, and Spring Boot integration
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Kafka Introduction
blogs.description: Introduction to Apache Kafka: topics, partitions, producers, consumers, and how to build event streaming applications
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Kafka Consumer Groups
blogs.description: Master Kafka consumer groups: parallel processing, rebalancing, partition assignment, and scaling strategies
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Kafka Streams vs Consumer API
blogs.description: Compare Kafka Streams API with the consumer API for stream processing: when to use each, stateful vs stateless operations, exactly-once semantics, and real-world use cases
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Kafka Schema Registry
blogs.description: Implement Schema Registry with Avro schemas: schema evolution, compatibility modes, serializers, and integration with Kafka producers and consumers
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Kafka Producer Acks Deep Dive
blogs.description: Deep dive into Kafka producer acknowledgment settings: acks=0, acks=1, acks=all, retries, idempotent producers, and delivery guarantees
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Kafka Partitioning Strategies
blogs.description: Comprehensive guide to Kafka partitioning strategies: default partitioning, custom partitioners, sticky partitioning, and performance optimization
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Kafka Connect
blogs.description: Implement Kafka Connect for streaming data between Kafka and external systems: source connectors, sink connectors, single message transforms, and production deployment
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Kafka Delivery Semantics: At-Least-Once vs Exactly-Once
blogs.description: Deep dive into Kafka delivery semantics: at-most-once, at-least-once, exactly-once for producers and consumers, transaction API, and idempotent consumers
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Choreography-Based Saga Pattern
blogs.description: Implement choreography-based saga pattern for distributed transactions in microservices: event-driven coordination, compensation, error handling, and Spring Boot examples
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Transactional Outbox Pattern
blogs.description: Implement the transactional outbox pattern for reliable event publishing in microservices: database-based outbox, polling publisher, change data capture, and Spring Boot integration
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Idempotent Consumer Pattern
blogs.description: Implement idempotent consumers in message-driven systems: deduplication strategies, idempotency keys, database-driven dedup, Redis-based dedup, and message idempotency in Kafka and RabbitMQ
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Event Sourcing Fundamentals
blogs.description: Learn event sourcing fundamentals: append-only event store, aggregate reconstruction, event versioning, snapshots, CQRS integration, and implementation with Axon Framework and Spring Boot
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Event Notification vs Event Carried State Transfer
blogs.description: Compare event notification and event-carried state transfer patterns: when to include data in events, reference-only events, trade-offs, and implementation strategies
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Event-Driven Architecture
blogs.description: Design event-driven microservices: event sourcing, CQRS, saga patterns, and message-driven communication
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari
